free_text: Study of residual product nuclide yields in 1-GeV
proton irradiated Pb-208 and 2.6-GeV proton irradiated
W-natural thin target.
Reaction data on 208-Pb.
Revision 1. The data for W-nat too.
A 38.1 mg/cm2 W-natural metal foil sample, 99.95% W,
less 0.05% of chemical impurities, a 10.5 mm diameter.
139.6 mg/cm2 and 139.1 mg/cm2 Al foils of the same
diameter were used as monitor. Chemical impurities of
the monitor did not exceed 0.001%.
LAHET,CEM95,CEM2K,CASCADE,CASCADE/INPE,INUCL
and YIELDx codes.
Irradiation time is unknown.
The main contribution to the total error is
from uncertainties in the nuclear data, namely, in the
absolute quantum yields and cross section of the
monitor reaction.
